title: Chaalbaaz
desc: Separated twins Anju and Manju grow up differently and accidentally swap lives. Shy Anju enters a rustic world, while bold Manju bravely takes revenge on their evil uncle.

title: Phool Bane Angaray
desc: Ranjit Singh uncovers strong evidence against a corrupt politician, putting himself at risk, while his wife courageously joins the police force to help him fight for justice.

title: Jism
desc: Kabir, an alcoholic lawyer, falls for Sonia, wife of a wealthy traveler. She lures him into murdering her husband, but her shocking motive leaves Kabir stunned.

title: Bhaiaji Superhit
desc: Lal Bhaisahab Dubey, a feared Varanasi gangster, decides to star in a film and hires a writer-director team, hoping that his newfound stardom will win back his estranged wife.

title: Lost
desc: After a plane crash, the survivors find themselves stranded on a mysterious island. As they struggle to stay alive, they must unite when they discover they are not alone.

title: Mili
desc: Mili Naudiyal works in a restaurant while preparing for Canada. Her life turns into a survival battle when she's accidentally locked inside a freezer.

title: Antim : The Final Truth
desc: A poor farmer's son rises in the city as a fearless gangster, but his reign is challenged when an unyielding cop steps in, sparking a fierce battle of power and justice.

title: Bhoot Returns
desc: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with their children, Taman and Nimmi. But mysterious events soon threaten their lives, forcing them to escape for survival.

title: Kurukshetra
desc: ACP Prithviraj, an honest officer, arrests Chief Minister Baburao's son for rape. In retaliation, Baburao spares no effort to take vengeance against Prithviraj.

title: Thank God
desc: An arrogant real estate broker meets God after an accident. Forced into a divine game, he must prove himself worthy, deciding between heaven's grace or hell's punishment.

title: Daraar
desc: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy businessman, falls for Priya Bhatia, a charming real estate agent. But when he proposes, his world shatters-Priya is already married.

title: Lingaa
desc: Lingaa, a small-time thief, changes his ways after learning how his grandfather built a dam to help villagers. Inspired, he fights corruption to save the dam and protect their future.

title: Andaaz
desc: After his sweetheart Kajal marries another, Raj moves to Europe.He eventually agrees to wed Jiya but is shocked to learn she is now-widowed Kajal's sister-in law.

title: Ghoomer
desc: Anina, a young cricket star, loses her right hand before her debut. With help from a failed cricketer and creative training, she becomes a bowler and invents a new style.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Mahi
desc: In an arranged marriage, failed cricketer Mahendra and doctor Mahima bond over their shared nickname, Mahi, and their love for cricket, inspiring her to pursue her dreams.

title: Bholaa
desc: An ex-convict, released after ten years, struggles to reunite with his daughter. His journey is filled with obstacles, testing his determination, love, and hope for redemption.

title: Rascals
desc: Two con men, Chetan and Bhagat, fall for Khushi. But Anthony, an old victim, kidnaps her to make them return the money they cheated from him.

title: Pure Bollywood
desc: Bollywood songs - catchy, emotional, and upbeat - dominate the charts. From heartbreak to celebration, these tracks capture every mood, making people dance, cry, and sing along everywhere.
